verse.unicode: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ੴ सति नामु करता पुरखु निरभउ निरवैरु अकाल मूरति अजूनी सैभं गुर प्रसादि ॥

en.ssk: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

verse.unicode: ਸਲੋਕ ਸਹਸਕ੍ਰਿਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सलोक सहसकृती महला १ ॥

en.ssk: Salok Sehskritee, First Mehl:

verse.unicode: ਪੜਿੑ ਪੁਸ੍ਤਕ ਸੰਧਿਆ ਬਾਦੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पड़ि्ि पुस्तक संधिआ बादं ॥

en.ssk: You study the scriptures, say your prayers and argue;

verse.unicode: ਸਿਲ ਪੂਜਸਿ ਬਗੁਲ ਸਮਾਧੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सिल पूजसि बगुल समाधं ॥

en.ssk: you worship stones and sit like a crane, pretending to meditate.

verse.unicode: ਮੁਖਿ ਝੂਠੁ ਬਿਭੂਖਨ ਸਾਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मुखि झूठु बिभूखन सारं ॥

en.ssk: You speak lies and well-ornamented falsehood,

verse.unicode: ਤ੍ਰੈਪਾਲ ਤਿਹਾਲ ਬਿਚਾਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: त्रैपाल तिहाल बिचारं ॥

en.ssk: and recite your daily prayers three times a day.

verse.unicode: ਗਲਿ ਮਾਲਾ ਤਿਲਕ ਲਿਲਾਟੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गलि माला तिलक लिलाटं ॥

en.ssk: The mala is around your neck, and the sacred tilak mark is on your forehead.

verse.unicode: ਦੁਇ ਧੋਤੀ ਬਸਤ੍ਰ ਕਪਾਟੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दुइ धोती बसत्र कपाटं ॥

en.ssk: You wear two loin cloths, and keep your head covered.

verse.unicode: ਜੋ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰ ਕਰਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जो जानसि ब्रहमं करमं ॥

en.ssk: If you know God and the nature of karma,

verse.unicode: ਸਭ ਫੋਕਟ ਨਿਸਚੈ ਕਰਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सभ फोकट निसचै करमं ॥

en.ssk: you know that all these rituals and beliefs are useless.

verse.unicode: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਸਚੌ ਧੵਿਾਵੈ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कहु नानक निसचौ धि्यावै ॥

en.ssk: Says Nanak, meditate on the Lord with faith.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਟ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥

transliteration.hindi: बिनु सतिगुर बाट न पावै ॥१॥

en.ssk: Without the True Guru, no one finds the Way. ||1||

verse.unicode: ਨਿਹਫਲੰ ਤਸੵ ਜਨਮਸੵ ਜਾਵਦ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨ ਬਿੰਦਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: निहफलं तस्य जनमस्य जावद ब्रहम न बिंदते ॥

en.ssk: The mortal's life is fruitless, as long as he does not know God.

verse.unicode: ਸਾਗਰੰ ਸੰਸਾਰਸੵ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਤਰਹਿ ਕੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सागरं संसारस्य गुर परसादी तरहि के ॥

en.ssk: Only a few, by Guru's Grace, cross over the world-ocean.

verse.unicode: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥

transliteration.hindi: करण कारण समरथु है कहु नानक बीचारि ॥

en.ssk: The Creator, the Cause of causes, is All-powerful. Thus speaks Nanak, after deep deliberation.

verse.unicode: ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਲ ਰਖੀ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੨॥

transliteration.hindi: कारणु करते वसि है जिनि कल रखी धारि ॥२॥

en.ssk: The Creation is under the control of the Creator. By His Power, He sustains and supports it. ||2||

verse.unicode: ਜੋਗ ਸਬਦੰ ਗਿਆਨ ਸਬਦੰ ਬੇਦ ਸਬਦੰ ਤ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जोग सबदं गिआन सबदं बेद सबदं त ब्राहमणह ॥

en.ssk: The Shabad is Yoga, the Shabad is spiritual wisdom; the Shabad is the Vedas for the Brahmin.

verse.unicode: ਖੵਤ੍ਰੀ ਸਬਦੰ ਸੂਰ ਸਬਦੰ ਸੂਦ੍ਰ ਸਬਦੰ ਪਰਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਤਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ख्यत्री सबदं सूर सबदं सूद्र सबदं परा कृतह ॥

en.ssk: The Shabad is heroic bravery for the Khshaatriya; the Shabad is service to others for the Soodra.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬ ਸਬਦੰ ਤ ਏਕ ਸਬਦੰ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਭੇਉ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरब सबदं त एक सबदं जे को जानसि भेउ ॥

en.ssk: The Shabad for all is the Shabad, the Word of the One God, for one who knows this secret.

verse.unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦੇਉ ॥੩॥

transliteration.hindi: नानक ता को दासु है सोई निरंजन देउ ॥३॥

en.ssk: Nanak is the slave of the Divine, Immaculate Lord. ||3||

verse.unicode: ਏਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਸ੍ਨੰ ਤ ਸਰਬ ਦੇਵਾ ਦੇਵ ਦੇਵਾ ਤ ਆਤਮਹ ॥ ਆਤਮੰ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਬਾਸ੍ਵਦੇਵਸੵ ਜੇ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਭੇਵ ॥

transliteration.hindi: एक कृस्नं त सरब देवा देव देवा त आतमह ॥ आतमं स्री बास्वदेवस्य जे कोई जानसि भेव ॥

en.ssk: The One Lord is the Divinity of all divinities. He is the Divinity of the soul.

verse.unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦੇਵ ॥੪॥

transliteration.hindi: नानक ता को दासु है सोई निरंजन देव ॥४॥

en.ssk: He is the Divine Immaculate Lord Himself. ||4||

verse.unicode: ਸਲੋਕ ਸਹਸਕ੍ਰਿਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫

transliteration.hindi: सलोक सहसकृती महला ५

en.ssk: Salok Sehskritee , Fifth Mehl:

verse.unicode: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ੴ सति नामु करता पुरखु निरभउ निरवैरु अकाल मूरति अजूनी सैभं गुर प्रसादि ॥

en.ssk: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

verse.unicode: ਕਤੰਚ ਮਾਤਾ ਕਤੰਚ ਪਿਤਾ ਕਤੰਚ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਸੁਤਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कतंच माता कतंच पिता कतंच बनिता बिनोद सुतह ॥

en.ssk: Who is the mother, and who is the father? Who is the son, and what is the pleasure of marriage?

verse.unicode: ਕਤੰਚ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਮੀਤ ਹਿਤ ਬੰਧਵ ਕਤੰਚ ਮੋਹ ਕੁਟੰਬੵਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कतंच भ्रात मीत हित बंधव कतंच मोह कुटंब्यते ॥

en.ssk: Who is the brother, friend, companion and relative? Who is emotionally attached to the family?

verse.unicode: ਕਤੰਚ ਚਪਲ ਮੋਹਨੀ ਰੂਪੰ ਪੇਖੰਤੇ ਤਿਆਗੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कतंच चपल मोहनी रूपं पेखंते तिआगं करोति ॥

en.ssk: Who is restlessly attached to beauty? It leaves, as soon as we see it.

verse.unicode: ਰਹੰਤ ਸੰਗ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਬਧੵੰ ਅਚੁਤ ਤਨਹ ॥੧॥

transliteration.hindi: रहंत संग भगवान सिमरण नानक लबध्यं अचुत तनह ॥१॥

en.ssk: Only the meditative remembrance of God remains with us. O Nanak, it brings the blessings of the Saints, the sons of the Imperishable Lord. ||1||

verse.unicode: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੰਤ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਨੇਹੰ ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸਨੇਹੰ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਬਾਂਧਵਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: धृगंत मात पिता सनेहं धृग सनेहं भ्रात बाँधवह ॥

en.ssk: Cursed is loving attachment to one's mother and father; cursed is loving attachment to one's siblings and relatives.

verse.unicode: ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹੰ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਲਾਸ ਸੁਤਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: धृग स्नेहं बनिता बिलास सुतह ॥

en.ssk: Cursed is attachment to the joys of family life with one's spouse and children.

verse.unicode: ਧ੍ਰਿਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹੰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਾਰਥ ਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: धृग स्नेहं गृहारथ कह ॥

en.ssk: Cursed is attachment to household affairs.

verse.unicode: ਸਾਧਸੰਗ ਸ੍ਨੇਹ ਸਤੵਿੰ ਸੁਖਯੰ ਬਸੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕਹ ॥੨॥

transliteration.hindi: साधसंग स्नेह सति्यं सुखयं बसंति नानकह ॥२॥

en.ssk: Only loving attachment to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is True. Nanak dwells there in peace. ||2||

verse.unicode: ਮਿਥੵੰਤ ਦੇਹੰ ਖੀਣੰਤ ਬਲਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मिथ्यंत देहं खीणंत बलनं ॥

en.ssk: The body is false; its power is temporary.

verse.unicode: ਬਰਧੰਤਿ ਜਰੂਆ ਹਿਤੵੰਤ ਮਾਇਆ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बरधंति जरूआ हित्यंत माइआ ॥

en.ssk: It grows old; its love for Maya increases greatly.

verse.unicode: ਅਤੵੰਤ ਆਸਾ ਆਥਿਤੵ ਭਵਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अत्यंत आसा आथित्य भवनं ॥

en.ssk: The human is only a temporary guest in the home of the body, but he has high hopes.

verse.unicode: ਗਨੰਤ ਸ੍ਵਾਸਾ ਭੈਯਾਨ ਧਰਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गनंत स्वासा भैयान धरमं ॥

en.ssk: The Righteous Judge of Dharma is relentless; he counts each and every breath.

verse.unicode: ਪਤੰਤਿ ਮੋਹ ਕੂਪ ਦੁਰਲਭੵ ਦੇਹੰ ਤਤ ਆਸ੍ਰਯੰ ਨਾਨਕ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पतंति मोह कूप दुरलभ्य देहं तत आस्रयं नानक ॥

en.ssk: The human body, so difficult to obtain, has fallen into the deep dark pit of emotional attachment. O Nanak, its only support is God, the Essence of Reality.

verse.unicode: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ॥੩॥

transliteration.hindi: गोबिंद गोबिंद गोबिंद गोपाल कृपा ॥३॥

en.ssk: O God, Lord of the World, Lord of the Universe, Master of the Universe, please be kind to me. ||3||

verse.unicode: ਕਾਚ ਕੋਟੰ ਰਚੰਤਿ ਤੋਯੰ ਲੇਪਨੰ ਰਕਤ ਚਰਮਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: काच कोटं रचंति तोयं लेपनं रकत चरमणह ॥

en.ssk: This fragile body-fortress is made up of water, plastered with blood and wrapped in skin.

verse.unicode: ਨਵੰਤ ਦੁਆਰੰ ਭੀਤ ਰਹਿਤੰ ਬਾਇ ਰੂਪੰ ਅਸਥੰਭਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नवंत दुआरं भीत रहितं बाइ रूपं असथंभनह ॥

en.ssk: It has nine gates, but no doors; it is supported by pillars of wind, the channels of the breath.

verse.unicode: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਾਨੰਤਿ ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गोबिंद नामं नह सिमरंति अगिआनी जानंति असथिरं ॥

en.ssk: The ignorant person does not meditate in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe; he thinks that this body is permanent.

verse.unicode: ਦੁਰਲਭ ਦੇਹ ਉਧਰੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਸਰਣ ਨਾਨਕ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दुरलभ देह उधरंत साध सरण नानक ॥

en.ssk: This precious body is saved and redeemed in the Sanctuary of the Holy, O Nanak,

verse.unicode: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਜਪੰਤਿ ॥੪॥

transliteration.hindi: हरि हरि हरि हरि हरि हरे जपंति ॥४॥

en.ssk: chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, Haray. ||4||

verse.unicode: ਸੁਭੰਤ ਤੁਯੰ ਅਚੁਤ ਗੁਣਗੵੰ ਪੂਰਨੰ ਬਹੁਲੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सुभंत तुयं अचुत गुणग्यं पूरनं बहुलो कृपाला ॥

en.ssk: O Glorious, Eternal and Imperishable, Perfect and Abundantly Compassionate,

verse.unicode: ਗੰਭੀਰੰ ਊਚੈ ਸਰਬਗਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गंभीरं ऊचै सरबगि अपारा ॥

en.ssk: Profound and Unfathomable, Lofty and Exalted, All-knowing and Infinite Lord God.

verse.unicode: ਭ੍ਰਿਤਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਿਅੰ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਚਰਣੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भृतिआ पृअं बिस्राम चरणं ॥

en.ssk: O Lover of Your devoted servants, Your Feet are a Sanctuary of Peace.

verse.unicode: ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣੰ ॥੫॥

transliteration.hindi: अनाथ नाथे नानक सरणं ॥५॥

en.ssk: O Master of the masterless, Helper of the helpless, Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||5||

verse.unicode: ਮ੍ਰਿਗੀ ਪੇਖੰਤ ਬਧਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਹਾਰੇਣ ਲਖੵ ਆਵਧਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मृगी पेखंत बधिक प्रहारेण लख्य आवधह ॥

en.ssk: Seeing the deer, the hunter aims his weapons.

verse.unicode: ਅਹੋ ਜਸੵ ਰਖੇਣ ਗੋਪਾਲਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੋਮ ਨ ਛੇਦੵਤੇ ॥੬॥

transliteration.hindi: अहो जस्य रखेण गोपालह नानक रोम न छेद्यते ॥६॥

en.ssk: But if one is protected by the Lord of the World, O Nanak, not a hair on his head will be touched. ||6||

verse.unicode: ਬਹੁ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਤਾ ਬਲਵੰਤ ਕਾਰੀ ਸੇਵੰਤ ਸੂਰਾ ਚਤੁਰ ਦਿਸਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बहु जतन करता बलवंत कारी सेवंत सूरा चतुर दिसह ॥

en.ssk: He may be surrounded on all four sides by servants and powerful warriors;

verse.unicode: ਬਿਖਮ ਥਾਨ ਬਸੰਤ ਊਚਹ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਮਰਣੰ ਕਦਾਂਚਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिखम थान बसंत ऊचह नह सिमरंत मरणं कदाँचह ॥

en.ssk: he may dwell in a lofty place, difficult to approach, and never even think of death.

verse.unicode: ਹੋਵੰਤਿ ਆਗਿਆ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀਟੀ ਸਾਸ ਅਕਰਖਤੇ ॥੭॥

transliteration.hindi: होवंति आगिआ भगवान पुरखह नानक कीटी सास अकरखते ॥७॥

en.ssk: But when the Order comes from the Primal Lord God, O Nanak, even an ant can take away his breath of life. ||7||

verse.unicode: ਸਬਦੰ ਰਤੰ ਹਿਤੰ ਮਇਆ ਕੀਰਤੰ ਕਲੀ ਕਰਮ ਕ੍ਰਿਤੁਆ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सबदं रतं हितं मइआ कीरतं कली करम कृतुआ ॥

en.ssk: To be imbued and attuned to the Word of the Shabad; to be kind and compassionate; to sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises - these are the most worthwhile actions in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

verse.unicode: ਮਿਟੰਤਿ ਤਤ੍ਰਾਗਤ ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मिटंति तत्रागत भरम मोहं ॥

en.ssk: In this way, one's inner doubts and emotional attachments are dispelled.

verse.unicode: ਭਗਵਾਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਥਾਨੵਿੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भगवान रमणं सरबत्र थानि्यं ॥

en.ssk: God is pervading and permeating all places.

verse.unicode: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟ ਤੁਯੰ ਅਮੋਘ ਦਰਸਨੰ ਬਸੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਰਸਨਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दृसट तुयं अमोघ दरसनं बसंत साध रसना ॥

en.ssk: So obtain the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; He dwells upon the tongues of the Holy.

verse.unicode: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਿਅੰ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਪਨਾ ॥੮॥

transliteration.hindi: हरि हरि हरि हरे नानक पृअं जापु जपना ॥८॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, meditate and chant the Name of the Beloved Lord, Har, Har, Har, Haray. ||8||

verse.unicode: ਘਟੰਤ ਰੂਪੰ ਘਟੰਤ ਦੀਪੰ ਘਟੰਤ ਰਵਿ ਸਸੀਅਰ ਨਖੵਤ੍ਰ ਗਗਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घटंत रूपं घटंत दीपं घटंत रवि ससीअर नख्यत्र गगनं ॥

en.ssk: Beauty fades away, islands fade away, the sun, moon, stars and sky fade away.

verse.unicode: ਘਟੰਤ ਬਸੁਧਾ ਗਿਰਿ ਤਰ ਸਿਖੰਡੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घटंत बसुधा गिरि तर सिखंडं ॥

en.ssk: The earth, mountains, forests and lands fade away.

verse.unicode: ਘਟੰਤ ਲਲਨਾ ਸੁਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਹੀਤੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घटंत ललना सुत भ्रात हीतं ॥

en.ssk: One's spouse, children, siblings and loved friends fade away.

verse.unicode: ਘਟੰਤ ਕਨਿਕ ਮਾਨਿਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਸ੍ਵਰੂਪੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घटंत कनिक मानिक माइआ स्वरूपं ॥

en.ssk: Gold and jewels and the incomparable beauty of Maya fade away.

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਘਟੰਤ ਕੇਵਲ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਅਚੁਤ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह घटंत केवल गोपाल अचुत ॥

en.ssk: Only the Eternal, Unchanging Lord does not fade away.

verse.unicode: ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ॥੯॥

transliteration.hindi: असथिरं नानक साध जन ॥९॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, only the humble Saints are steady and stable forever. ||9||

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਬਿਲੰਬ ਧਰਮੰ ਬਿਲੰਬ ਪਾਪੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह बिलंब धरमं बिलंब पापं ॥

en.ssk: Do not delay in practicing righteousness; delay in committing sins.

verse.unicode: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤ ਨਾਮੰ ਤਜੰਤ ਲੋਭੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दृड़ंत नामं तजंत लोभं ॥

en.ssk: Implant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within yourself, and abandon greed.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਣਿ ਸੰਤੰ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਨਾਸੰ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤੰ ਧਰਮ ਲਖੵਿਣ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरणि संतं किलबिख नासं प्रापतं धरम लखि्यण ॥

en.ssk: In the Sanctuary of the Saints, the sins are erased. The character of righteousness is received by that person,

verse.unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਹ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਮਾਧਵਹ ॥੧੦॥

transliteration.hindi: नानक जिह सुप्रसंन माधवह ॥१०॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, with whom the Lord is pleased and satisfied. ||10||

verse.unicode: ਮਿਰਤ ਮੋਹੰ ਅਲਪ ਬੁਧੵੰ ਰਚੰਤਿ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਸਾਹੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मिरत मोहं अलप बुध्यं रचंति बनिता बिनोद साहं ॥

en.ssk: The person of shallow understanding is dying in emotional attachment; he is engrossed in pursuits of pleasure with his wife.

verse.unicode: ਜੌਬਨ ਬਹਿਕ੍ਰਮ ਕਨਿਕ ਕੁੰਡਲਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जौबन बहिक्रम कनिक कुँडलह ॥

en.ssk: With youthful beauty and golden earrings,

verse.unicode: ਬਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਮੰਦਿਰ ਸੋਭੰਤਿ ਬਸਤ੍ਰਾ ਇਤੵੰਤ ਮਾਇਆ ਬੵਾਪਿਤੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बचित्र मंदिर सोभंति बसत्रा इत्यंत माइआ ब्यापितं ॥

en.ssk: wondrous mansions, decorations and clothes - this is how Maya clings to him.

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਅਚੁਤ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋ ਭਗਵਾਨਏ ਨਮਹ ॥੧੧॥

transliteration.hindi: हे अचुत सरणि संत नानक भो भगवानए नमह ॥११॥

en.ssk: O Eternal, Unchanging, Benevolent Lord God, O Sanctuary of the Saints, Nanak humbly bows to You. ||11||

verse.unicode: ਜਨਮੰ ਤ ਮਰਣੰ ਹਰਖੰ ਤ ਸੋਗੰ ਭੋਗੰ ਤ ਰੋਗੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जनमं त मरणं हरखं त सोगं भोगं त रोगं ॥

en.ssk: If there is birth, then there is death. If there is pleasure, then there is pain. If there is enjoyment, then there is disease.

verse.unicode: ਊਚੰ ਤ ਨੀਚੰ ਨਾਨੑਾ ਸੁ ਮੂਚੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ऊचं त नीचं नान्ना सु मूचं ॥

en.ssk: If there is high, then there is low. If there is small, then there is great.

verse.unicode: ਰਾਜੰ ਤ ਮਾਨੰ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੰ ਤ ਹੀਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: राजं त मानं अभिमानं त हीनं ॥

en.ssk: If there is power, then there is pride. If there is egotistical pride, then there will be a fall.

verse.unicode: ਪ੍ਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਮਾਰਗੰ ਵਰਤੰਤਿ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: प्रविरति मारगं वरतंति बिनासनं ॥

en.ssk: Engrossed in worldly ways, one is ruined.

verse.unicode: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਨ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਭਜਨਾਸਨੰ ॥੧੨॥

transliteration.hindi: गोबिंद भजन साध संगेण असथिरं नानक भगवंत भजनासनं ॥१२॥

en.ssk: Meditating and vibrating on the Lord of the Universe in the Company of the Holy, you shall become steady and stable. Nanak vibrates and meditates on the Lord God. ||12||

verse.unicode: ਕਿਰਪੰਤ ਹਰੀਅੰ ਮਤਿ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: किरपंत हरीअं मति ततु गिआनं ॥

en.ssk: By the Grace of God, genuine understanding comes to the mind.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਗਸੀਧੵਿ ਬੁਧਾ ਕੁਸਲ ਥਾਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिगसीधि्य बुधा कुसल थानं ॥

en.ssk: The intellect blossoms forth, and one finds a place in the realm of celestial bliss.

verse.unicode: ਬਸੵਿੰਤ ਰਿਖਿਅੰ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਮਾਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बसि्यंत रिखिअं तिआगि मानं ॥

en.ssk: The senses are brought under control, and pride is abandoned.

verse.unicode: ਸੀਤਲੰਤ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਸੰਤ ਗਿਆਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सीतलंत रिदयं दृड़ु संत गिआनं ॥

en.ssk: The heart is cooled and soothed, and the wisdom of the Saints is implanted within.

verse.unicode: ਰਹੰਤ ਜਨਮੰ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸ ਲੀਣਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: रहंत जनमं हरि दरस लीणा ॥

en.ssk: Reincarnation is ended, and the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan is obtained.

verse.unicode: ਬਾਜੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦ ਬੀਣਾਂ ॥੧੩॥

transliteration.hindi: बाजंत नानक सबद बीणाँ ॥१३॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, the musical instrument of the Word of the Shabad vibrates and resounds within. ||13||

verse.unicode: ਕਹੰਤ ਬੇਦਾ ਗੁਣੰਤ ਗੁਨੀਆ ਸੁਣੰਤ ਬਾਲਾ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कहंत बेदा गुणंत गुनीआ सुणंत बाला बहु बिधि प्रकारा ॥

en.ssk: The Vedas preach and recount God's Glories; people hear them by various ways and means.

verse.unicode: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤ ਸੁਬਿਦਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दृड़ंत सुबिदिआ हरि हरि कृपाला ॥

en.ssk: The Merciful Lord, Har, Har, implants spiritual wisdom within.

verse.unicode: ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਜਾਚੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੈਨਹਾਰ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ॥੧੪॥

transliteration.hindi: नाम दानु जाचंत नानक दैनहार गुर गोपाला ॥१४॥

en.ssk: Nanak begs for the Gift of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. The Guru is the Great Giver, the Lord of the World. ||14||

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤਹ ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਕਛੁ ਲੋਕ ਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह चिंता मात पित भ्रातह नह चिंता कछु लोक कह ॥

en.ssk: Do not worry so much about your mother, father and siblings. Do not worry so much about other people.

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਮੀਤਹ ਪ੍ਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਨਬੰਧਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह चिंता बनिता सुत मीतह प्रविरति माइआ सनबंधनह ॥

en.ssk: Do not worry about your spouse, children and friends. You are obsessed with your involvements in Maya.

verse.unicode: ਦਇਆਲ ਏਕ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਕਹ ॥੧੫॥

transliteration.hindi: दइआल एक भगवान पुरखह नानक सरब जीअ प्रतिपालकह ॥१५॥

en.ssk: The One Lord God is Kind and Compassionate, O Nanak. He is the Cherisher and Nurturer of all living beings. ||15||

verse.unicode: ਅਨਿਤੵ ਵਿਤੰ ਅਨਿਤੵ ਚਿਤੰ ਅਨਿਤੵ ਆਸਾ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अनित्य वितं अनित्य चितं अनित्य आसा बहु बिधि प्रकारं ॥

en.ssk: Wealth is temporary; conscious existence is temporary; hopes of all sorts are temporary.

verse.unicode: ਅਨਿਤੵ ਹੇਤੰ ਅਹੰ ਬੰਧੰ ਭਰਮ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਲਨੰ ਬਿਕਾਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अनित्य हेतं अहं बंधं भरम माइआ मलनं बिकारं ॥

en.ssk: The bonds of love, attachment, egotism, doubt, Maya and the pollution of corruption are temporary.

verse.unicode: ਫਿਰੰਤ ਜੋਨਿ ਅਨੇਕ ਜਠਰਾਗਨਿ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਮਲੀਣ ਬੁਧੵੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: फिरंत जोनि अनेक जठरागनि नह सिमरंत मलीण बुध्यं ॥

en.ssk: The mortal passes through the fire of the womb of reincarnation countless times. He does not remember the Lord in meditation; his understanding is polluted.

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕਰਤ ਮਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮਹ ॥੧੬॥

transliteration.hindi: हे गोबिंद करत मइआ नानक पतित उधारण साध संगमह ॥१६॥

en.ssk: O Lord of the Universe, when You grant Your Grace, even sinners are saved. Nanak dwells in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||16||

verse.unicode: ਗਿਰੰਤ ਗਿਰਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਤਾਲੰ ਜਲੰਤ ਦੇਦੀਪੵ ਬੈਸ੍ਵਾਂਤਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गिरंत गिरि पतित पातालं जलंत देदीप्य बैस्वाँतरह ॥

en.ssk: You may drop down from the mountains, and fall into the nether regions of the underworld, or be burnt in the blazing fire,

verse.unicode: ਬਹੰਤਿ ਅਗਾਹ ਤੋਯੰ ਤਰੰਗੰ ਦੁਖੰਤ ਗ੍ਰਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਨਮੰ ਤ ਮਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बहंति अगाह तोयं तरंगं दुखंत ग्रह चिंता जनमं त मरणह ॥

en.ssk: or swept away by the unfathomable waves of water; but the worst pain of all is household anxiety, which is the source of the cycle of death and rebirth.

verse.unicode: ਅਨਿਕ ਸਾਧਨੰ ਨ ਸਿਧੵਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਸਬਦ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੧੭॥

transliteration.hindi: अनिक साधनं न सिध्यते नानक असथंभं असथंभं असथंभं सबद साध स्वजनह ॥१७॥

en.ssk: No matter what you do, you cannot break its bonds, O Nanak. Man's only Support, Anchor and Mainstay is the Word of the Shabad, and the Holy, Friendly Saints. ||17||

verse.unicode: ਘੋਰ ਦੁਖੵੰ ਅਨਿਕ ਹਤੵੰ ਜਨਮ ਦਾਰਿਦ੍ਰੰ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖੵਾਦੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घोर दुख्यं अनिक हत्यं जनम दारिद्रं महा बिख्यादं ॥

en.ssk: Excruciating pain, countless killings, reincarnation, poverty and terrible misery

verse.unicode: ਮਿਟੰਤ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੈਸੇ ਪਾਵਕ ਕਾਸਟ ਭਸਮੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੧੮॥

transliteration.hindi: मिटंत सगल सिमरंत हरि नाम नानक जैसे पावक कासट भसमं करोति ॥१८॥

en.ssk: are all destroyed by meditating in remembrance on the Lord's Name, O Nanak, just as fire reduces piles of wood to ashes. ||18||

verse.unicode: ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਸੰ ਗੁਣ ਰਮੰਤ ਅਘ ਖੰਡਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अंधकार सिमरत प्रकासं गुण रमंत अघ खंडनह ॥

en.ssk: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the darkness is illuminated. Dwelling on His Glorious Praises, the ugly sins are destroyed.

verse.unicode: ਰਿਦ ਬਸੰਤਿ ਭੈ ਭੀਤ ਦੂਤਹ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤ ਮਹਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: रिद बसंति भै भीत दूतह करम करत महा निरमलह ॥

en.ssk: Enshrining the Lord deep within the heart, and with the immaculate karma of doing good deeds, one strikes fear into the demons.

verse.unicode: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਰਹੰਤ ਸ੍ਰੋਤਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਮੂਹ ਅਮੋਘ ਦਰਸਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जनम मरण रहंत स्रोता सुख समूह अमोघ दरसनह ॥

en.ssk: The cycle of coming and going in reincarnation is ended, absolute peace is obtained, and the Fruitful Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਣਿ ਜੋਗੰ ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਖੇਮੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੧੯॥

transliteration.hindi: सरणि जोगं संत पृअ नानक सो भगवान खेमं करोति ॥१९॥

en.ssk: He is Potent to give Protection, He is the Lover of His Saints. O Nanak, the Lord God blesses all with bliss. ||19||

verse.unicode: ਪਾਛੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਅਗ੍ਰਣੀਵਹ ਨਿਰਾਸੰ ਆਸ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पाछं करोति अग्रणीवह निरासं आस पूरनह ॥

en.ssk: Those who were left behind - the Lord brings them to the front. He fulfills the hopes of the hopeless.

verse.unicode: ਨਿਰਧਨ ਭਯੰ ਧਨਵੰਤਹ ਰੋਗੀਅੰ ਰੋਗ ਖੰਡਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: निरधन भयं धनवंतह रोगीअं रोग खंडनह ॥

en.ssk: He makes the poor rich, and cures the illnesses of the ill.

verse.unicode: ਭਗਤੵੰ ਭਗਤਿ ਦਾਨੰ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भगत्यं भगति दानं राम नाम गुण कीरतनह ॥

en.ssk: He blesses His devotees with devotion. They sing the Kirtan of the Praises of the Lord's Name.

verse.unicode: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪੁਰਖ ਦਾਤਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਿੰ ਨ ਲਭੵਤੇ ॥੨੦॥

transliteration.hindi: पारब्रहम पुरख दातारह नानक गुर सेवा किं न लभ्यते ॥२०॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, those who serve the Guru find the Supreme Lord God, the Great Giver||20||

verse.unicode: ਅਧਰੰ ਧਰੰ ਧਾਰਣਹ ਨਿਰਧਨੰ ਧਨ ਨਾਮ ਨਰਹਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अधरं धरं धारणह निरधनं धन नाम नरहरह ॥

en.ssk: He gives Support to the unsupported. The Name of the Lord is the Wealth of the poor.

verse.unicode: ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਬਲਹੀਣ ਬਲ ਕੇਸਵਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अनाथ नाथ गोबिंदह बलहीण बल केसवह ॥

en.ssk: The Lord of the Universe is the Master of the masterless; the Beautiful-haired Lord is the Power of the weak.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬ ਭੂਤ ਦਯਾਲ ਅਚੁਤ ਦੀਨ ਬਾਂਧਵ ਦਾਮੋਦਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरब भूत दयाल अचुत दीन बाँधव दामोदरह ॥

en.ssk: The Lord is Merciful to all beings, Eternal and Unchanging, the Family of the meek and humble.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬਗੵ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਭਗਵਾਨਹ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरबग्य पूरन पुरख भगवानह भगति वछल करुणा मयह ॥

en.ssk: The All-knowing, Perfect, Primal Lord God is the Lover of His devotees, the Embodiment of Mercy.

verse.unicode: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬਸੰਤ ਬਾਸੁਦੇਵਹ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: घटि घटि बसंत बासुदेवह पारब्रहम परमेसुरह ॥

en.ssk: The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent, Luminous Lord, dwells in each and every heart.

verse.unicode: ਜਾਚੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੰ ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਹ ॥੨੧॥

transliteration.hindi: जाचंति नानक कृपाल प्रसादं नह बिसरंति नह बिसरंति नाराइणह ॥२१॥

en.ssk: Nanak begs for this blessing from the Merciful Lord, that he may never forget Him, never forget Him. ||21||

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਸਮਰਥੰ ਨਹ ਸੇਵਕੰ ਨਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਰਮ ਪੁਰਖੋਤਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह समरथं नह सेवकं नह प्रीति परम पुरखोतमं ॥

en.ssk: I have no power; I do not serve You, and I do not love You, O Supreme Sublime Lord God.

verse.unicode: ਤਵ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਿਮਰਤੇ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੰ ॥੨੨॥

transliteration.hindi: तव प्रसादि सिमरते नामं नानक कृपाल हरि हरि गुरं ॥२२॥

en.ssk: By Your Grace, Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Merciful Lord, Har, Har. ||22||

verse.unicode: ਭਰਣ ਪੋਖਣ ਕਰੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਛਾਦਨ ਦੇਵੰਤ ਦਾਨੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भरण पोखण करंत जीआ बिस्राम छादन देवंत दानं ॥

en.ssk: The Lord feeds and sustains all living beings; He blesses them gifts of restful peace and fine clothes.

verse.unicode: ਸ੍ਰਿਜੰਤ ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮ ਚਤੁਰ ਚੇਤਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सृजंत रतन जनम चतुर चेतनह ॥

en.ssk: He created the jewel of human life, with all its cleverness and intelligence.

verse.unicode: ਵਰਤੰਤਿ ਸੁਖ ਆਨੰਦ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: वरतंति सुख आनंद प्रसादह ॥

en.ssk: By His Grace, mortals abide in peace and bliss. O Nanak, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har, Haray, The mortal is released from attachment to the world. ||23||

verse.unicode: ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सिमरंत नानक हरि हरि हरे ॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har, Haray,

verse.unicode: ਅਨਿਤੵ ਰਚਨਾ ਨਿਰਮੋਹ ਤੇ ॥੨੩॥

transliteration.hindi: अनित्य रचना निरमोह ते ॥२३॥

en.ssk: the mortal is released from attachment to the world. ||23||

verse.unicode: ਦਾਨੰ ਪਰਾ ਪੂਰਬੇਣ ਭੁੰਚੰਤੇ ਮਹੀਪਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दानं परा पूरबेण भुँचंते महीपते ॥

en.ssk: The kings of the earth are eating up the blessings of the good karma of their past lives.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਪਰੀਤ ਬੁਧੵੰ ਮਾਰਤ ਲੋਕਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿਰੰਕਾਲ ਦੁਖ ਭੋਗਤੇ ॥੨੪॥

transliteration.hindi: बिपरीत बुध्यं मारत लोकह नानक चिरंकाल दुख भोगते ॥२४॥

en.ssk: Those cruel-minded rulers who oppress the people, O Nanak, shall suffer in pain for a very long time. ||24||

verse.unicode: ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਜਸੵ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਰਿਦੰਤਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बृथा अनुग्रहं गोबिंदह जस्य सिमरण रिदंतरह ॥

en.ssk: Those who meditate in remembrance on the Lord in their hearts, look upon even pain as God's Grace.

verse.unicode: ਆਰੋਗੵੰ ਮਹਾ ਰੋਗੵੰ ਬਿਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤੇ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥੨੫॥

transliteration.hindi: आरोग्यं महा रोग्यं बिसिमृते करुणा मयह ॥२५॥

en.ssk: The healthy person is very sick, if he does not remember the Lord, the Embodiment of Mercy. ||25||

verse.unicode: ਰਮਣੰ ਕੇਵਲੰ ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਸੁਧਰਮੰ ਦੇਹ ਧਾਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: रमणं केवलं कीरतनं सुधरमं देह धारणह ॥

en.ssk: To sing the Kirtan of God's Praises is the righteous duty incurred by taking birth in this human body.

verse.unicode: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੀਵਤੰ ਸੰਤ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੨੬॥

transliteration.hindi: अंमृत नामु नाराइण नानक पीवतं संत न तृप्यते ॥२६॥

en.ssk: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is Ambrosial Nectar, O Nanak. The Saints drink it in, and never have enough of it. ||26||

verse.unicode: ਸਹਣ ਸੀਲ ਸੰਤੰ ਸਮ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਸੵ ਦੁਰਜਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सहण सील संतं सम मित्रस्य दुरजनह ॥

en.ssk: The Saints are tolerant and good-natured; friends and enemies are the same to them.

verse.unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋਜਨ ਅਨਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੇਣ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਆਵਧ ਹੋਇ ਉਪਤਿਸਟਤੇ ॥੨੭॥

transliteration.hindi: नानक भोजन अनिक प्रकारेण निंदक आवध होइ उपतिसटते ॥२७॥

en.ssk: O Nanak, it is all the same to them, whether someone offers them all sorts of foods, or slanders them, or draws weapons to kill them. ||27||

verse.unicode: ਤਿਰਸਕਾਰ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਮਾਨ ਭੰਗਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: तिरसकार नह भवंति नह भवंति मान भंगनह ॥

en.ssk: They pay no attention to dishonor or disrespect.

verse.unicode: ਸੋਭਾ ਹੀਨ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਪੋਹੰਤਿ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਦੁਖਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सोभा हीन नह भवंति नह पोहंति संसार दुखनह ॥

en.ssk: They are not bothered by gossip; the miseries of the world do not touch them.

verse.unicode: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮ ਜਪੰਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸੁਖ ਬਾਸਨਹ ॥੨੮॥

transliteration.hindi: गोबिंद नाम जपंति मिलि साध संगह नानक से प्राणी सुख बासनह ॥२८॥

en.ssk: Those who join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and chant the Name of the Lord of the Universe - O Nanak, those mortals abide in peace. ||28||

verse.unicode: ਸੈਨਾ ਸਾਧ ਸਮੂਹ ਸੂਰ ਅਜਿਤੰ ਸੰਨਾਹੰ ਤਨਿ ਨਿੰਮ੍ਰਤਾਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सैना साध समूह सूर अजितं संनाहं तनि निंम्रताह ॥

en.ssk: The Holy people are an invincible army of spiritual warriors; their bodies are protected by the armor of humility.

verse.unicode: ਆਵਧਹ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਮਣੰ ਓਟ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦ ਕਰ ਚਰਮਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: आवधह गुण गोबिंद रमणं ओट गुर सबद कर चरमणह ॥

en.ssk: Their weapons are the Glorious Praises of the Lord which they chant; their Shelter and Shield is the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

verse.unicode: ਆਰੂੜਤੇ ਅਸ੍ਵ ਰਥ ਨਾਗਹ ਬੁਝੰਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਰਗਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: आरूड़ते अस्व रथ नागह बुझंते प्रभ मारगह ॥

en.ssk: The horses, chariots and elephants they ride are their way to realize God's Path.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਚਰਤੇ ਨਿਰਭਯੰ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਸੈਨਾ ਧਾਯੰਤੇ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिचरते निरभयं सत्रु सैना धायंते गुोपाल कीरतनह ॥

en.ssk: They walk fearlessly through the armies of their enemies; they attack them with the Kirtan of God's Praises.

verse.unicode: ਜਿਤਤੇ ਬਿਸ੍ਵ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਸੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਪੰਚ ਤਸਕਰਹ ॥੨੯॥

transliteration.hindi: जितते बिस्व संसारह नानक वस्यं करोति पंच तसकरह ॥२९॥

en.ssk: They conquer the entire world, O Nanak, and overpower the five thieves. ||29||

verse.unicode: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਨਗਰੰ ਦ੍ਰੁਮ ਛਾਯਾ ਰਚਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मृग तृसना गंधरब नगरं द्रुम छाया रचि दुरमतिह ॥

en.ssk: Misled by evil-mindedness, mortals are engrossed in the mirage of the illusory world, like the passing shade of a tree.

verse.unicode: ਤਤਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਮੋਹ ਮਿਥੵਾ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਹ ॥੩੦॥

transliteration.hindi: ततह कुटंब मोह मिथ्या सिमरंति नानक राम राम नामह ॥३०॥

en.ssk: Emotional attachment to family is false, so Nanak meditates in remembrance on the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam. ||30||

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਿਗਮੰ ਨਚ ਗੁਣਗੵ ਨਾਮ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच बिदिआ निधान निगमं नच गुणग्य नाम कीरतनह ॥

en.ssk: I do not possess the treasure of the wisdom of the Vedas, nor do I possess the merits of the Praises of the Naam.

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਰਾਗ ਰਤਨ ਕੰਠੰ ਨਹ ਚੰਚਲ ਚਤੁਰ ਚਾਤੁਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच राग रतन कंठं नह चंचल चतुर चातुरह ॥

en.ssk: I do not have a beautiful voice to sing jewelled melodies; I am not clever, wise or shrewd.

verse.unicode: ਭਾਗ ਉਦਿਮ ਲਬਧੵੰ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਖਲ ਪੰਡਿਤਹ ॥੩੧॥

transliteration.hindi: भाग उदिम लबध्यं माइआ नानक साधसंगि खल पंडितह ॥३१॥

en.ssk: By destiny and hard work, the wealth of Maya is obtained. O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, even fools become religious scholars. ||31||

verse.unicode: ਕੰਠ ਰਮਣੀਯ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਮਾਲਾ ਹਸਤ ਊਚ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਧਾਰਣੀ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कंठ रमणीय राम राम माला हसत ऊच प्रेम धारणी ॥

en.ssk: The mala around my neck is the chanting of the Lord's Name. The Love of the Lord is my silent chanting.

verse.unicode: ਜੀਹ ਭਣਿ ਜੋ ਉਤਮ ਸਲੋਕ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਨੈਨ ਨੰਦਨੀ ॥੩੨॥

transliteration.hindi: जीह भणि जो उतम सलोक उधरणं नैन नंदनी ॥३२॥

en.ssk: Chanting this most Sublime Word brings salvation and joy to the eyes. ||32||

verse.unicode: ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰ ਹੀਣਸੵ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੰਤ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਸਟਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गुर मंत्र हीणस्य जो प्राणी धृगंत जनम भ्रसटणह ॥

en.ssk: That mortal who lacks the Guru's Mantra - cursed and contaminated is his life.

verse.unicode: ਕੂਕਰਹ ਸੂਕਰਹ ਗਰਧਭਹ ਕਾਕਹ ਸਰਪਨਹ ਤੁਲਿ ਖਲਹ ॥੩੩॥

transliteration.hindi: कूकरह सूकरह गरधभह काकह सरपनह तुलि खलह ॥३३॥

en.ssk: That blockhead is just a dog, a pig, a jackass, a crow, a snake. ||33||

verse.unicode: ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਨੰ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਨਾਮ ਧਾਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: चरणारबिंद भजनं रिदयं नाम धारणह ॥

en.ssk: Whoever contemplates the Lord's Lotus Feet, and enshrines His Name within the heart,

verse.unicode: ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰਤਿ ਜਮਦੂਤਨਹ ॥੩੪॥

transliteration.hindi: कीरतनं साधसंगेण नानक नह दृसटंति जमदूतनह ॥३४॥

en.ssk: and sings the Kirtan of His Praises in the Saadh Sangat, O Nanak, shall never see the Messenger of Death. ||34||

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਧਨੰ ਰੂਪੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸ੍ਵਰਗ ਰਾਜਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच दुरलभं धनं रूपं नच दुरलभं स्वरग राजनह ॥

en.ssk: Wealth and beauty are not so difficult to obtain. Paradise and royal power are not so difficult to obtain.

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਭੋਜਨੰ ਬਿੰਜਨੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸ੍ਵਛ ਅੰਬਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच दुरलभं भोजनं बिंजनं नच दुरलभं स्वछ अंबरह ॥

en.ssk: Foods and delicacies are not so difficult to obtain. Elegant clothes are not so difficuilt to obtain.

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸੁਤ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਬਾਂਧਵ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਲਾਸਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच दुरलभं सुत मित्र भ्रात बाँधव नच दुरलभं बनिता बिलासह ॥

en.ssk: Children, friends, siblings and relatives are not so difficult to obtain. The pleasures of woman are not so difficult to obtain.

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਬੀਣੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਚਤੁਰ ਚੰਚਲਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच दुरलभं बिदिआ प्रबीणं नच दुरलभं चतुर चंचलह ॥

en.ssk: Knowledge and wisdom are not so difficult to obtain. Cleverness and trickery are not so difficult to obtain.

verse.unicode: ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਏਕ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਨਾਮਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਬਧੵਿੰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੰ ॥੩੫॥

transliteration.hindi: दुरलभं एक भगवान नामह नानक लबधि्यं साधसंगि कृपा प्रभं ॥३५॥

en.ssk: Only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is difficult to obtain. O Nanak, it is only obtained by God's Grace, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||35||

verse.unicode: ਜਤ ਕਤਹ ਤਤਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰ ਸ੍ਵਰਗ ਮਰਤ ਪਯਾਲ ਲੋਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जत कतह ततह दृसटं स्वरग मरत पयाल लोकह ॥

en.ssk: Wherever I look, I see the Lord, whether in this world, in paradise, or the nether regions of the underworld.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਰਮਣੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਪ ਛੇਪ ਨ ਲਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੩੬॥

transliteration.hindi: सरबत्र रमणं गोबिंदह नानक लेप छेप न लिप्यते ॥३६॥

en.ssk: The Lord of the Universe is All-pervading everywhere. O Nanak, no blame or stain sticks to Him. ||36||

verse.unicode: ਬਿਖਯਾ ਭਯੰਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੰ ਦ੍ਰੁਸਟਾਂ ਸਖਾ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिखया भयंति अंमृतं द्रुसटाँ सखा स्वजनह ॥

en.ssk: Poison is transformed into nectar, and enemies into friends and companions.

verse.unicode: ਦੁਖੰ ਭਯੰਤਿ ਸੁਖੵੰ ਭੈ ਭੀਤੰ ਤ ਨਿਰਭਯਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दुखं भयंति सुख्यं भै भीतं त निरभयह ॥

en.ssk: Pain is changed into pleasure, and the fearful become fearless.

verse.unicode: ਥਾਨ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਹ ॥੩੭॥

transliteration.hindi: थान बिहून बिस्राम नामं नानक कृपाल हरि हरि गुरह ॥३७॥

en.ssk: Those who have no home or place find their place of rest in the Naam, O Nanak, when the Guru, the Lord, becomes Merciful. ||37||

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬ ਸੀਲ ਮਮੰ ਸੀਲੰ ਸਰਬ ਪਾਵਨ ਮਮ ਪਾਵਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरब सील ममं सीलं सरब पावन मम पावनह ॥

en.ssk: He blesses all with humility; He has blessed me with humility as well. He purifies all, and He has purified me as well.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬ ਕਰਤਬ ਮਮੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਪ ਛੇਪ ਨ ਲਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੩੮॥

transliteration.hindi: सरब करतब ममं करता नानक लेप छेप न लिप्यते ॥३८॥

en.ssk: The Creator of all is the Creator of me as well. O Nanak, no blame or stain sticks to Him. ||38||

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਚੰਦ੍ਰ ਦੇਵਹ ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਬਾਵਨ ਚੰਦਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नह सीतलं चंद्र देवह नह सीतलं बावन चंदनह ॥

en.ssk: The moon-god is not cool and calm, nor is the white sandalwood tree.

verse.unicode: ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਸੀਤ ਰੁਤੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੩੯॥

transliteration.hindi: नह सीतलं सीत रुतेण नानक सीतलं साध स्वजनह ॥३९॥

en.ssk: The winter season is not cool; O Nanak, only the Holy friends, the Saints, are cool and calm. ||39||

verse.unicode: ਮੰਤ੍ਰੰ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੰ ਧੵਾਨੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मंत्रं राम राम नामं ध्यानं सरबत्र पूरनह ॥

en.ssk: Through the Mantra of the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, one meditates on the All-pervading Lord.

verse.unicode: ਗੵਾਨੰ ਸਮ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖੰ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਰਵੈਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ग्यानं सम दुख सुखं जुगति निरमल निरवैरणह ॥

en.ssk: Those who have the wisdom to look alike upon pleasure and pain, live the immaculate lifestyle, free of vengeance.

verse.unicode: ਦਯਾਲੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਜੀਆ ਪੰਚ ਦੋਖ ਬਿਵਰਜਿਤਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दयालं सरबत्र जीआ पंच दोख बिवरजितह ॥

en.ssk: They are kind to all beings; they have overpowered the five thieves.

verse.unicode: ਭੋਜਨੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਅਲਪ ਮਾਯਾ ਜਲ ਕਮਲ ਰਹਤਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भोजनं गोपाल कीरतनं अलप माया जल कमल रहतह ॥

en.ssk: They take the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise as their food; they remain untouched by Maya, like the lotus in the water.

verse.unicode: ਉਪਦੇਸੰ ਸਮ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਤ੍ਰਹ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਵਨੀ ॥

transliteration.hindi: उपदेसं सम मित्र सत्रह भगवंत भगति भावनी ॥

en.ssk: They share the Teachings with friend and enemy alike; they love the devotional worship of God.

verse.unicode: ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਨਹ ਸ੍ਰੋਤਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੰ ਆਪੁ ਤੵਿਾਗਿ ਸਗਲ ਰੇਣੁਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पर निंदा नह स्रोति स्रवणं आपु ति्यागि सगल रेणुकह ॥

en.ssk: They do not listen to slander; renouncing self-conceit, they become the dust of all.

verse.unicode: ਖਟ ਲਖੵਣ ਪੂਰਨੰ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੪੦॥

transliteration.hindi: खट लख्यण पूरनं पुरखह नानक नाम साध स्वजनह ॥४०॥

en.ssk: Whoever has these six qualities, O Nanak, is called a Holy friend. ||40||

verse.unicode: ਅਜਾ ਭੋਗੰਤ ਕੰਦ ਮੂਲੰ ਬਸੰਤੇ ਸਮੀਪਿ ਕੇਹਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अजा भोगंत कंद मूलं बसंते समीपि केहरह ॥

en.ssk: The goat enjoys eating fruits and roots, but if it lives near a tiger, it is always anxious.

verse.unicode: ਤਤ੍ਰ ਗਤੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਗ ਹਰਖੰ ਬਿਆਪਤੇ ॥੪੧॥

transliteration.hindi: तत्र गते संसारह नानक सोग हरखं बिआपते ॥४१॥

en.ssk: This is the condition of the world, O Nanak; it is afflicted by pleasure and pain. ||41||

verse.unicode: ਛਲੰ ਛਿਦ੍ਰੰ ਕੋਟਿ ਬਿਘਨੰ ਅਪਰਾਧੰ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਮਲੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: छलं छिद्रं कोटि बिघनं अपराधं किलबिख मलं ॥

en.ssk: Fraud, false accusations, millions of diseases, sins and the filthy residues of evil mistakes;

verse.unicode: ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹੰ ਮਾਨ ਅਪਮਾਨੰ ਮਦੰ ਮਾਯਾ ਬਿਆਪਿਤੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भरम मोहं मान अपमानं मदं माया बिआपितं ॥

en.ssk: doubt, emotional attachment, pride, dishonor and intoxication with Maya

verse.unicode: ਮ੍ਰਿਤੵੁ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਨਰਕਹ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵੰ ਨ ਸਿਧੵਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मृत्यु जनम भ्रमंति नरकह अनिक उपावं न सिध्यते ॥

en.ssk: these lead mortals to death and rebirth, wandering lost in hell. In spite of all sorts of efforts, salvation is not found.

verse.unicode: ਨਿਰਮਲੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਹ ਜਪੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਨਾਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: निरमलं साध संगह जपंति नानक गोपाल नामं ॥

en.ssk: Chanting and meditating on the Name of the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, mortals become immaculate and pure.

verse.unicode: ਰਮੰਤਿ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਤਹ ॥੪੨॥

transliteration.hindi: रमंति गुण गोबिंद नित प्रतह ॥४२॥

en.ssk: They continually dwell upon the Glorious Praises of God. ||42||

verse.unicode: ਤਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਮਣ ਸੀਲ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: तरण सरण सुआमी रमण सील परमेसुरह ॥

en.ssk: In the Sanctuary of the Kind-hearted Lord, our Transcendent Lord and Master, we are carried across.

verse.unicode: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥਹ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਤ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: करण कारण समरथह दानु देत प्रभु पूरनह ॥

en.ssk: God is the Perfect, All-powerful Cause of causes; He is the Giver of gifts.

verse.unicode: ਨਿਰਾਸ ਆਸ ਕਰਣੰ ਸਗਲ ਅਰਥ ਆਲਯਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: निरास आस करणं सगल अरथ आलयह ॥

en.ssk: He gives hope to the hopeless. He is the Source of all riches.

verse.unicode: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਗਲ ਜਾਚੰਤ ਜਾਚਿਕਹ ॥੪੩॥

transliteration.hindi: गुण निधान सिमरंति नानक सगल जाचंत जाचिकह ॥४३॥

en.ssk: Nanak meditates in remembrance on the Treasure of Virtue; we are all beggars, begging at His Door. ||43||

verse.unicode: ਦੁਰਗਮ ਸਥਾਨ ਸੁਗਮੰ ਮਹਾ ਦੂਖ ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दुरगम सथान सुगमं महा दूख सरब सूखणह ॥

en.ssk: The most difficult place becomes easy, and the worst pain turns into pleasure.

verse.unicode: ਦੁਰਬਚਨ ਭੇਦ ਭਰਮੰ ਸਾਕਤ ਪਿਸਨੰ ਤ ਸੁਰਜਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: दुरबचन भेद भरमं साकत पिसनं त सुरजनह ॥

en.ssk: Evil words, differences and doubts are obliterated, and even faithless cynics and malicious gossips become good people.

verse.unicode: ਅਸਥਿਤੰ ਸੋਗ ਹਰਖੰ ਭੈ ਖੀਣੰ ਤ ਨਿਰਭਵਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: असथितं सोग हरखं भै खीणं त निरभवह ॥

en.ssk: They become steady and stable, whether happy or sad; their fears are taken away, and they are fearless.

verse.unicode: ਭੈ ਅਟਵੀਅੰ ਮਹਾ ਨਗਰ ਬਾਸੰ ਧਰਮ ਲਖੵਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਇਆ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भै अटवीअं महा नगर बासं धरम लख्यण प्रभ मइआ ॥

en.ssk: The dreadful woods become a well-populated city; such are the merits of the righteous life of Dharma, given by God's Grace.

verse.unicode: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਯਾਲ ਚਰਣੰ ॥੪੪॥

transliteration.hindi: साध संगम राम राम रमणं सरणि नानक हरि हरि दयाल चरणं ॥४४॥

en.ssk: Chanting the Lord's Name in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, the Lotus Feet of the Merciful Lord are found. ||44||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਅਜਿਤ ਸੂਰ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਾਮੰ ਅਤਿ ਬਲਨਾ ਬਹੁ ਮਰਦਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे अजित सूर संग्रामं अति बलना बहु मरदनह ॥

en.ssk: O emotional attachment, you are the invincible warrior of the battlefield of life; you totally crush and destroy even the most powerful.

verse.unicode: ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਦੇਵ ਮਾਨੁਖੵੰ ਪਸੁ ਪੰਖੀ ਬਿਮੋਹਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गण गंधरब देव मानुख्यं पसु पंखी बिमोहनह ॥

en.ssk: You entice and fascinate even the heavenly heralds, celestial singers, gods, mortals, beasts and birds.

verse.unicode: ਹਰਿ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੰ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੰ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਗਦੀਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥੪੫॥

transliteration.hindi: हरि करणहारं नमसकारं सरणि नानक जगदीस्वरह ॥४५॥

en.ssk: Nanak bows in humble surrender to the Lord; he seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord of the Universe. ||45||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਕਾਮੰ ਨਰਕ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮੰ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭ੍ਰਮਾਵਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे कामं नरक बिस्रामं बहु जोनी भ्रमावणह ॥

en.ssk: O sexual desire, you lead the mortals to hell; you make them wander in reincarnation through countless species.

verse.unicode: ਚਿਤ ਹਰਣੰ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਲੋਕ ਗੰਮੵੰ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੀਲ ਬਿਦਾਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: चित हरणं त्रै लोक गंम्यं जप तप सील बिदारणह ॥

en.ssk: You cheat the consciousness, and pervade the three worlds. You destroy meditation, penance and virtue.

verse.unicode: ਅਲਪ ਸੁਖ ਅਵਿਤ ਚੰਚਲ ਊਚ ਨੀਚ ਸਮਾਵਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अलप सुख अवित चंचल ऊच नीच समावणह ॥

en.ssk: But you give only shallow pleasure, while you make the mortals weak and unsteady; you pervade the high and the low.

verse.unicode: ਤਵ ਭੈ ਬਿਮੁੰਚਿਤ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਓਟ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਹ ॥੪੬॥

transliteration.hindi: तव भै बिमुँचित साध संगम ओट नानक नाराइणह ॥४६॥

en.ssk: Your fear is dispelled in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, through the Protection and Support of the Lord. ||46||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਕਲਿ ਮੂਲ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੰ ਕਦੰਚ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਨ ਉਪਰਜਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे कलि मूल क्रोधं कदंच करुणा न उपरजते ॥

en.ssk: O anger, you are the root of conflict; compassion never rises up in you.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਖਯੰਤ ਜੀਵੰ ਵਸੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਨਿਰਤੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਜਥਾ ਮਰਕਟਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिखयंत जीवं वस्यं करोति निरत्यं करोति जथा मरकटह ॥

en.ssk: You take the corrupt, sinful beings in your power, and make them dance like monkeys.

verse.unicode: ਅਨਿਕ ਸਾਸਨ ਤਾੜੰਤਿ ਜਮਦੂਤਹ ਤਵ ਸੰਗੇ ਅਧਮੰ ਨਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अनिक सासन ताड़ंति जमदूतह तव संगे अधमं नरह ॥

en.ssk: Associating with you, mortals are debased and punished by the Messenger of Death in so many ways.

verse.unicode: ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਦਯਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਰਖੵਾ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੪੭॥

transliteration.hindi: दीन दुख भंजन दयाल प्रभु नानक सरब जीअ रख्या करोति ॥४७॥

en.ssk: O Destroyer of the pains of the poor, O Merciful God, Nanak prays for You to protect all begins from such anger. ||47||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਲੋਭਾ ਲੰਪਟ ਸੰਗ ਸਿਰਮੋਰਹ ਅਨਿਕ ਲਹਰੀ ਕਲੋਲਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे लोभा लंपट संग सिरमोरह अनिक लहरी कलोलते ॥

en.ssk: O greed, you cling to even the great, assaulting them with countless waves.

verse.unicode: ਧਾਵੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੰ ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਡੋਲਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: धावंत जीआ बहु प्रकारं अनिक भाँति बहु डोलते ॥

en.ssk: You cause them to run around wildly in all directions, wobbling and wavering unsteadily.

verse.unicode: ਨਚ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੰ ਨਚ ਇਸਟੰ ਨਚ ਬਾਧਵ ਨਚ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਤਵ ਲਜਯਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नच मित्रं नच इसटं नच बाधव नच मात पिता तव लजया ॥

en.ssk: You have no respect for friends, ideals, relations, mother or father.

verse.unicode: ਅਕਰਣੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਅਖਾਦੵਿ ਖਾਦੵੰ ਅਸਾਜੵੰ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਮਜਯਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अकरणं करोति अखादि्य खाद्यं असाज्यं साजि समजया ॥

en.ssk: You make them do what they should not do. You make them eat what they should not eat. You make them accomplish what they should not accomplish.

verse.unicode: ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬਿਗੵਾਪ੍ਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਰਹਰਹ ॥੪੮॥

transliteration.hindi: त्राहि त्राहि सरणि सुआमी बिग्यापि्त नानक हरि नरहरह ॥४८॥

en.ssk: Save me, save me - I have come to Your Sanctuary, O my Lord and Master; Nanak prays to the Lord. ||48||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਮੂਲੰ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੰ ਪਾਪਾਤਮਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे जनम मरण मूलं अहंकारं पापातमा ॥

en.ssk: O egotism, you are the root of birth and death and the cycle of reincarnation; you are the very soul of sin.

verse.unicode: ਮਿਤ੍ਰੰ ਤਜੰਤਿ ਸਤ੍ਰੰ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਮਾਯਾ ਬਿਸ੍ਤੀਰਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मित्रं तजंति सत्रं दृड़ंति अनिक माया बिस्तीरनह ॥

en.ssk: You forsake friends, and hold tight to enemies. You spread out countless illusions of Maya.

verse.unicode: ਆਵੰਤ ਜਾਵੰਤ ਥਕੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਬਹੁ ਭੋਗਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: आवंत जावंत थकंत जीआ दुख सुख बहु भोगणह ॥

en.ssk: You cause the living beings to come and go until they are exhausted. You lead them to experience pain and pleasure.

verse.unicode: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭਯਾਨ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਕਟ ਅਸਾਧ ਰੋਗਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: भ्रम भयान उदिआन रमणं महा बिकट असाध रोगणह ॥

en.ssk: You lead them to wander lost in the terrible wilderness of doubt; you lead them to contract the most horrible, incurable diseases.

verse.unicode: ਬੈਦੵੰ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸ੍ਵਰ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੪੯॥

transliteration.hindi: बैद्यं पारब्रहम परमेस्वर आराधि नानक हरि हरि हरे ॥४९॥

en.ssk: The only Physician is the Supreme Lord, the Transcendent Lord God. Nanak worships and adores the Lord, Har, Har, Haray. ||49||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਨਾਥ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਜਗਦ ਗੁਰੋ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे प्राण नाथ गोबिंदह कृपा निधान जगद गुरो ॥

en.ssk: O Lord of the Universe, Master of the Breath of life, Treasure of Mercy, Guru of the World.

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਤਾਪ ਹਰਣਹ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਸਭ ਦੁਖ ਹਰੋ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे संसार ताप हरणह करुणा मै सभ दुख हरो ॥

en.ssk: O Destroyer of the fever of the world, Embodiment of Compassion, please take away all my pain.

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਸਰਣਿ ਜੋਗ ਦਯਾਲਹ ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥ ਮਯਾ ਕਰੋ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे सरणि जोग दयालह दीना नाथ मया करो ॥

en.ssk: O Merciful Lord, Potent to give Sanctuary, Master of the meek and humble, please be kind to me.

verse.unicode: ਸਰੀਰ ਸ੍ਵਸਥ ਖੀਣ ਸਮਏ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਦਾਮੋਦਰ ਮਾਧਵਹ ॥੫੦॥

transliteration.hindi: सरीर स्वसथ खीण समए सिमरंति नानक राम दामोदर माधवह ॥५०॥

en.ssk: Whether his body is healthy or sick, let Nanak meditate in remembrance on You, Lord. ||50||

verse.unicode: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਣੰ ਰਮਣੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: चरण कमल सरणं रमणं गोपाल कीरतनह ॥

en.ssk: I have come to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Lotus Feet, where I sing the Kirtan of His Praises.

verse.unicode: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਤਰਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਹਾ ਸਾਗਰ ਭੈ ਦੁਤਰਹ ॥੫੧॥

transliteration.hindi: साध संगेण तरणं नानक महा सागर भै दुतरह ॥५१॥

en.ssk: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak is carried across the utterly terrifying, difficult world-ocean. ||51||

verse.unicode: ਸਿਰ ਮਸ੍ਤਕ ਰਖੵਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੰ ਹਸ੍ਤ ਕਾਯਾ ਰਖੵਾ ਪਰਮੇਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सिर मस्तक रख्या पारब्रहमं हस्त काया रख्या परमेस्वरह ॥

en.ssk: The Supreme Lord God has procted my head and forehead; the Transcendent Lord has protected my hands and body.

verse.unicode: ਆਤਮ ਰਖੵਾ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਧਨ ਚਰਣ ਰਖੵਾ ਜਗਦੀਸ੍ਵਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: आतम रख्या गोपाल सुआमी धन चरण रख्या जगदीस्वरह ॥

en.ssk: God, my Lord and Master, has saved my soul; the Lord of the Universe has saved my wealth and feet.

verse.unicode: ਸਰਬ ਰਖੵਾ ਗੁਰ ਦਯਾਲਹ ਭੈ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सरब रख्या गुर दयालह भै दूख बिनासनह ॥

en.ssk: The Merciful Guru has protected everything, and destroyed my fear and suffering.

verse.unicode: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥੇ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਚੁਤਹ ॥੫੨॥

transliteration.hindi: भगति वछल अनाथ नाथे सरणि नानक पुरख अचुतह ॥५२॥

en.ssk: God is the Lover of His devotees, the Master of the masterless. Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Imperishable Primal Lord God. ||52||

verse.unicode: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਆਕਾਸੰ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੰ ਕਾਸਟ ਬੇਸਟੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जेन कला धारिओ आकासं बैसंतरं कासट बेसटं ॥

en.ssk: His Power supports the sky, and locks fire within wood.

verse.unicode: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਸਸਿ ਸੂਰ ਨਖੵਤ੍ਰ ਜੋਤੵਿੰ ਸਾਸੰ ਸਰੀਰ ਧਾਰਣੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जेन कला ससि सूर नख्यत्र जोति्यं सासं सरीर धारणं ॥

en.ssk: His Power supports the moon, the sun and the stars, and infuses light and breath into the body.

verse.unicode: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੰ ਨਹ ਛੇਦੰਤ ਜਠਰ ਰੋਗਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: जेन कला मात गरभ प्रतिपालं नह छेदंत जठर रोगणह ॥

en.ssk: His Power provides nourishment in the womb of the mother, and does not let disease strike.

verse.unicode: ਤੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਸਰੋਵਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਛਿਜੰਤਿ ਤਰੰਗ ਤੋਯਣਹ ॥੫੩॥

transliteration.hindi: तेन कला असथंभं सरोवरं नानक नह छिजंति तरंग तोयणह ॥५३॥

en.ssk: His Power holds back the ocean, O Nanak, and does not allow the waves of water to destroy the land. ||53||

verse.unicode: ਗੁਸਾਂਈ ਗਰਿਸ੍ਟ ਰੂਪੇਣ ਸਿਮਰਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਜੀਵਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गुसाँई गरिस्ट रूपेण सिमरणं सरबत्र जीवणह ॥

en.ssk: The Lord of the World is Supremely Beautiful; His Meditation is the Life of all.

verse.unicode: ਲਬਧੵੰ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਸ੍ਵਛ ਮਾਰਗ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਣਹ ॥੫੪॥

transliteration.hindi: लबध्यं संत संगेण नानक स्वछ मारग हरि भगतणह ॥५४॥

en.ssk: In the Society of the Saints, O Nanak, He is found on the path of devotional worship of the Lord. ||54||

verse.unicode: ਮਸਕੰ ਭਗਨੰਤ ਸੈਲੰ ਕਰਦਮੰ ਤਰੰਤ ਪਪੀਲਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मसकं भगनंत सैलं करदमं तरंत पपीलकह ॥

en.ssk: The mosquito pierces the stone, the ant crosses the swamp,

verse.unicode: ਸਾਗਰੰ ਲੰਘੰਤਿ ਪਿੰਗੰ ਤਮ ਪਰਗਾਸ ਅੰਧਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सागरं लंघंति पिंगं तम परगास अंधकह ॥

en.ssk: the cripple crosses the ocean, and the blind sees in the darkness,

verse.unicode: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣਿ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੫੫॥

transliteration.hindi: साध संगेणि सिमरंति गोबिंद सरणि नानक हरि हरि हरे ॥५५॥

en.ssk: meditating on the Lord of the Universe in the Saadh Sangat. Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord, Har, Har, Haray. ||55||

verse.unicode: ਤਿਲਕ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਬਿਪ੍ਰਾ ਅਮਰ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਰਾਜਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: तिलक हीणं जथा बिप्रा अमर हीणं जथा राजनह ॥

en.ssk: Like a Brahmin without a sacred mark on his forehead, or a king without the power of command,

verse.unicode: ਆਵਧ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਸੂਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਧਰਮ ਹੀਣੰ ਤਥਾ ਬੈਸ੍ਨਵਹ ॥੫੬॥

transliteration.hindi: आवध हीणं जथा सूरा नानक धरम हीणं तथा बैस्नवह ॥५६॥

en.ssk: or a warrior without weapons, so is the devotee of God without Dharmic Faith. ||56||

verse.unicode: ਨ ਸੰਖੰ ਨ ਚਕ੍ਰੰ ਨ ਗਦਾ ਨ ਸਿਆਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: न संखं न चक्रं न गदा न सिआमं ॥

en.ssk: God has no conch-shell, no religious mark, no paraphernalia; he does not have blue skin.

verse.unicode: ਅਸ੍ਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੰ ਰਹੰਤ ਜਨਮੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अस्चरज रूपं रहंत जनमं ॥

en.ssk: His Form is Wondrous and Amazing. He is beyond incarnation.

verse.unicode: ਨੇਤ ਨੇਤ ਕਥੰਤਿ ਬੇਦਾ ॥

transliteration.hindi: नेत नेत कथंति बेदा ॥

en.ssk: The Vedas say that He is not this, and not that.

verse.unicode: ਊਚ ਮੂਚ ਅਪਾਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ऊच मूच अपार गोबिंदह ॥

en.ssk: The Lord of the Universe is Lofty and High, Great and Infinite.

verse.unicode: ਬਸੰਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਅਚੁਤ ਬੁਝੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਡਭਾਗੀਅਹ ॥੫੭॥

transliteration.hindi: बसंति साध रिदयं अचुत बुझंति नानक बडभागीअह ॥५७॥

en.ssk: The Imperishable Lord abides in the hearts of the Holy. He is understood, O Nanak, by those who are very fortunate. ||57||

verse.unicode: ਉਦਿਆਨ ਬਸਨੰ ਸੰਸਾਰੰ ਸਨਬੰਧੀ ਸ੍ਵਾਨ ਸਿਆਲ ਖਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: उदिआन बसनं संसारं सनबंधी स्वान सिआल खरह ॥

en.ssk: Living in the world, it is like a wild jungle. One's relatives are like dogs, jackals and donkeys.

verse.unicode: ਬਿਖਮ ਸਥਾਨ ਮਨ ਮੋਹ ਮਦਿਰੰ ਮਹਾਂ ਅਸਾਧ ਪੰਚ ਤਸਕਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बिखम सथान मन मोह मदिरं महाँ असाध पंच तसकरह ॥

en.ssk: In this difficult place, the mind is intoxicated with the wine of emotional attachment; the five unconquered thieves lurk there.

verse.unicode: ਹੀਤ ਮੋਹ ਭੈ ਭਰਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਣੰ ਅਹੰ ਫਾਂਸ ਤੀਖੵਣ ਕਠਿਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हीत मोह भै भरम भ्रमणं अहं फाँस तीख्यण कठिनह ॥

en.ssk: The mortals wander lost in love and emotional attachment, fear and doubt; they are caught in the sharp, strong noose of egotism.

verse.unicode: ਪਾਵਕ ਤੋਅ ਅਸਾਧ ਘੋਰੰ ਅਗਮ ਤੀਰ ਨਹ ਲੰਘਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पावक तोअ असाध घोरं अगम तीर नह लंघनह ॥

en.ssk: The ocean of fire is terrifying and impassable. The distant shore is so far away; it cannot be reached.

verse.unicode: ਭਜੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਉਧਰਣ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ॥੫੮॥

transliteration.hindi: भजु साधसंगि गुोपाल नानक हरि चरण सरण उधरण कृपा ॥५८॥

en.ssk: Vibrate and meditate on the Lord of the World, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; O Nanak, by His Grace, we are saved at the Lotus Feet of the Lord. ||58||

verse.unicode: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੰਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲਹ ਸਗਲੵੰ ਰੋਗ ਖੰਡਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: कृपा करंत गोबिंद गोपालह सगल्यं रोग खंडणह ॥

en.ssk: When the Lord of the Universe grants His Grace, all illnesses are cured.

verse.unicode: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥੫੯॥

transliteration.hindi: साध संगेणि गुण रमत नानक सरणि पूरन परमेसुरह ॥५९॥

en.ssk: Nanak chants His Glorious Praises in the Saadh Sangat, in the Sanctuary of the Perfect Transcendent Lord God. ||59||

verse.unicode: ਸਿਆਮਲੰ ਮਧੁਰ ਮਾਨੁਖੵੰ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਭੂਮਿ ਵੈਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सिआमलं मधुर मानुख्यं रिदयं भूमि वैरणह ॥

en.ssk: The mortal is beautiful and speaks sweet words, but in the farm of his heart, he harbors cruel vengeance.

verse.unicode: ਨਿਵੰਤਿ ਹੋਵੰਤਿ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਚੇਤਨੰ ਸੰਤ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੬੦॥

transliteration.hindi: निवंति होवंति मिथिआ चेतनं संत स्वजनह ॥६०॥

en.ssk: He pretends to bow in worship, but he is false. Beware of him, O friendly Saints. ||60||

verse.unicode: ਅਚੇਤ ਮੂੜਾ ਨ ਜਾਣੰਤ ਘਟੰਤ ਸਾਸਾ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अचेत मूड़ा न जाणंत घटंत सासा नित प्रते ॥

en.ssk: The thoughtless fool does not know that each day, his breaths are being used up.

verse.unicode: ਛਿਜੰਤ ਮਹਾ ਸੁੰਦਰੀ ਕਾਂਇਆ ਕਾਲ ਕੰਨਿਆ ਗ੍ਰਾਸਤੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: छिजंत महा सुँदरी काँइआ काल कंनिआ ग्रासते ॥

en.ssk: His most beautiful body is wearing away; old age, the daughter of death, has seized it.

verse.unicode: ਰਚੰਤਿ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਲੀਲਾ ਅਨਿਤ ਆਸਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਿਨੋਦ ॥

transliteration.hindi: रचंति पुरखह कुटंब लीला अनित आसा बिखिआ बिनोद ॥

en.ssk: He is engrossed in family play; placing his hopes in transitory things, he indulges in corrupt pleasures.

verse.unicode: ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਜਨਮ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥੬੧॥

transliteration.hindi: भ्रमंति भ्रमंति बहु जनम हारिओ सरणि नानक करुणा मयह ॥६१॥

en.ssk: Wandering lost in countless incarnations, he is exhausted. Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Embodiment of Mercy. ||61||

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਜਿਹਬੇ ਹੇ ਰਸਗੇ ਮਧੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਤੁਯੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे जिहबे हे रसगे मधुर पृअ तुयं ॥

en.ssk: O tongue, you love to enjoy the sweet delicacies.

verse.unicode: ਸਤ ਹਤੰ ਪਰਮ ਬਾਦੰ ਅਵਰਤ ਏਥਹ ਸੁਧ ਅਛਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: सत हतं परम बादं अवरत एथह सुध अछरणह ॥

en.ssk: You are dead to the Truth, and involved in great disputes. Instead, repeat the holy words:

verse.unicode: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਦਾਮੋਦਰ ਮਾਧਵੇ ॥੬੨॥

transliteration.hindi: गोबिंद दामोदर माधवे ॥६२॥

en.ssk: Gobind, Daamodar, Maadhav. ||62||

verse.unicode: ਗਰਬੰਤਿ ਨਾਰੀ ਮਦੋਨ ਮਤੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: गरबंति नारी मदोन मतं ॥

en.ssk: Those who are proud, and intoxicated with the pleasures of sex,

verse.unicode: ਬਲਵੰਤ ਬਲਾਤ ਕਾਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बलवंत बलात कारणह ॥

en.ssk: and asserting their power over others,

verse.unicode: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਨਹ ਭਜੰਤ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜਨਮਨਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: चरन कमल नह भजंत तृण समानि धृगु जनमनह ॥

en.ssk: never contemplate the Lord's Lotus Feet. Their lives are cursed, and as worthless as straw.

verse.unicode: ਹੇ ਪਪੀਲਕਾ ਗ੍ਰਸਟੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਤੁਯੰ ਧਨੇ ॥

transliteration.hindi: हे पपीलका ग्रसटे गोबिंद सिमरण तुयं धने ॥

en.ssk: You are as tiny and insignificant as an ant, but you shall become great, by the Wealth of the Lord's Meditation.

verse.unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਨਮੋ ਨਮਹ ॥੬੩॥

transliteration.hindi: नानक अनिक बार नमो नमह ॥६३॥

en.ssk: Nanak bows in humble worship, countless times, over and over again. ||63||

verse.unicode: ਤ੍ਰਿਣੰ ਤ ਮੇਰੰ ਸਹਕੰ ਤ ਹਰੀਅੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: तृणं त मेरं सहकं त हरीअं ॥

en.ssk: The blade of grass becomes a mountain, and the barren land becomes green.

verse.unicode: ਬੂਡੰ ਤ ਤਰੀਅੰ ਊਣੰ ਤ ਭਰੀਅੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: बूडं त तरीअं ऊणं त भरीअं ॥

en.ssk: The drowning one swims across, and the empty is filled to overflowing.

verse.unicode: ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਕੋਟਿ ਸੂਰ ਉਜਾਰੰ ॥

transliteration.hindi: अंधकार कोटि सूर उजारं ॥

en.ssk: Millions of suns illuminate the darkness,

verse.unicode: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਦਯਾਰੰ ॥੬੪॥

transliteration.hindi: बिनवंति नानक हरि गुर दयारं ॥६४॥

en.ssk: prays Nanak, when the Guru, the Lord, becomes Merciful. ||64||

verse.unicode: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਰਮ ਜਿ ਪੂਰਣਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: ब्रहमणह संगि उधरणं ब्रहम करम जि पूरणह ॥

en.ssk: Associating with the Brahmin, one is saved, if his actions are perfect and God-like.

verse.unicode: ਆਤਮ ਰਤੰ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਗਹੰ ਤੇ ਨਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਹਫਲਹ ॥੬੫॥

transliteration.hindi: आतम रतं संसार गहं ते नर नानक निहफलह ॥६५॥

en.ssk: Those whose souls are imbued with the world - O Nanak, their lives are fruitless. ||65||

verse.unicode: ਪਰ ਦਰਬ ਹਿਰਣੰ ਬਹੁ ਵਿਘਨ ਕਰਣੰ ਉਚਰਣੰ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਕਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: पर दरब हिरणं बहु विघन करणं उचरणं सरब जीअ कह ॥

en.ssk: The mortal steals the wealth of others, and makes all sorts of problems; his preaching is only for his own livelihood.

verse.unicode: ਲਉ ਲਈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਤਿਪਤਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਏ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤ ਸਿ ਸੂਕਰਹ ॥੬੬॥

transliteration.hindi: लउ लई तृसना अतिपति मन माए करम करत सि सूकरह ॥६६॥

en.ssk: His desire for this and that is not satisfied; his mind is caught in Maya, and he is acting like a pig. ||66||

verse.unicode: ਮਤੇ ਸਮੇਵ ਚਰਣੰ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਭੈ ਦੁਤਰਹ ॥

transliteration.hindi: मते समेव चरणं उधरणं भै दुतरह ॥

en.ssk: Those who are intoxicated and absorbed in the Lord's Lotus Feet are saved from the terrifying world-ocean.

verse.unicode: ਅਨੇਕ ਪਾਤਿਕ ਹਰਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਨ ਸੰਸਯਹ ॥੬੭॥੪॥

transliteration.hindi: अनेक पातिक हरणं नानक साध संगम न संसयह ॥६७॥४॥

en.ssk: Countless sins are destroyed, O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; there is no doubt about this. ||67||4||
